summary: Iteration 9 — validated the 3 new features (Sound interaction hooks, Booking availability backend, Unified admin auth) plus regression. Backend: 18/18 pytest pass (test_iter9.py). Frontend Playwright on production URL: ApexSound present with all 6 methods (enable/disable/toggle/isEnabled/play/_unlock), types=['hover','click','success','navigate'], initiallyEnabled=false (no autoplay), play() before user gesture does NOT throw, enable() flips localStorage 'apex_sound' to 'on', disable() flips to 'off' (persistence verified). SoundController custom-event wiring (apex:success, hashchange, popstate) and pointer handlers attach without errors. Booking UI: GET /api/bookings/availability fetched on date change, taken slot rendered as '<HH:MM> — Booked' with disabled=true (verified: 15:00 disabled, 8 other slots enabled). Submitting an available slot (2031-05-21 16:00) shows booking-success block. Unified admin auth: GET /api/admin/leads.csv, /api/admin/leads/{id}/quote.pdf, AND /api/admin/leads (JSON) ALL return 200 with either X-Admin-Token header OR ?token= query param; 401 returned without token or with wrong token. Regression: /api/, POST /api/leads, /api/admin/analytics, /api/admin/login, /api/chat/stream all pass. Navigation Home→Admin (login with apex-admin-2026)→Home produced 0 console errors. UI unchanged at hero/sections/portfolio (verified in iter8; visual parity confirmed by loader+layout intact).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py require_admin (lines 117-126) cleanly unifies header+query token via a single Depends, addressing iter8's review comment about split conventions. Good fix.
Contact.jsx BookingBlock fetch effect (lines 199-206) correctly cancels stale requests via the `cancelled` flag — race-safe on rapid date changes.

Booking time fallback effect (lines 209-215) automatically moves the user off a now-taken slot to the first free one — nice UX touch; consider also clearing b.time if ALL slots are taken (currently would leave a disabled selection).
sound.js play() correctly guards with `if (!enabled || !unlocked) return;` so it is safe to invoke before user gesture. localStorage.getItem at module init reads persisted state — good.

SoundController.jsx uses { once: true } for firstGesture but does NOT add it to the cleanup removeEventListener list. Minor leak risk on rapid mount/unmount; not a real issue in practice since it's a single-fire.
test_credentials: Admin token: apex-admin-2026 (works on BOTH X-Admin-Token header AND ?token= query for /api/admin/leads, /api/admin/leads.csv, /api/admin/leads/{id}/quote.pdf, /api/admin/analytics).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed records via tests: bookings on 2030-11-15 14:30, 2030-11-15 15:00, 2031-05-21 16:00; ~3 TEST_ leads (test_iter9_*@apex.media). All safe to leave or delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apex Media iter9 confirms 3 new features fully working: (1) window.ApexSound singleton + opt-in via enable()/localStorage; (2) /api/bookings/availability + 409 on conflict + UI option disabled with '— Booked' suffix; (3) require_admin accepts header OR ?token= uniformly across ALL admin JSON & file endpoints. Canonical regression suites: /app/backend/tests/test_regression.py (iter8) + /app/backend/tests/test_iter9.py (iter9 new features). Booking time options are fixed: 09:00,10:00,11:00,12:00,14:00,15:00,16:00,17:00,18:00 — if you seed slots outside this set (e.g. 14:30) they won't appear in the UI dropdown.
